title: Set up your ERP
subtitle: These steps explain how to open {{projectName}} on your computer after downloading it. The ERP runs from the folder you extract.
chooseOsSubtitle: We opened the most likely option for your computer. If you downloaded for another system, open that section instead.

items.title: Keep the command window open
items.body: When the ERP starts, a black command/terminal window may open. Do not close it while using the ERP, because it keeps the app running.

items.title: Your data stays in the folder
items.body: Records you enter are saved inside the extracted ERP folder. Keep that folder safe and do not delete it unless you no longer need the ERP.

items.title: Use it again later
items.body: To use the ERP tomorrow or next week, open the same extracted folder and run the same start file again.

windows-x64.intro: Use this if you are on a Windows computer.
steps: Find {{fileName}} in your Downloads folder.
Right-click the ZIP file and choose Extract All. Finish the extraction.
Open the extracted folder for {{projectName}}.
Double-click {{startFile}}. If Windows asks for confirmation, choose to run it.
Wait until the command window says the ERP is ready, then open the browser link it shows.
Keep the command window open while using the ERP. Close it only when you are finished.
Next time, open the same extracted folder and double-click {{startFile}} again.

macos-arm64.intro: Use this for newer Mac computers with Apple Silicon chips, such as M1, M2, M3, or newer.
steps: Find {{fileName}} in your Downloads folder.
Double-click the ZIP file to extract it.
Open the extracted folder for {{projectName}}.
Double-click {{startFile}}. If macOS blocks it, Control-click it, choose Open, then confirm.
Wait for the terminal window to show the ERP link, then open that link in your browser.
Keep the terminal window open while using the ERP.
Next time, open the same extracted folder and run {{startFile}} again.

macos-x64.intro: Use this for older Mac computers with Intel processors.
steps: Find {{fileName}} in your Downloads folder.
Double-click the ZIP file to extract it.
Open the extracted folder for {{projectName}}.
Double-click {{startFile}}. If macOS blocks it, Control-click it, choose Open, then confirm.
Wait for the terminal window to show the ERP link, then open that link in your browser.
Keep the terminal window open while using the ERP.
Next time, open the same extracted folder and run {{startFile}} again.
Find {{fileName}} in your Downloads folder.
Extract the ZIP file using your file manager.
Open the extracted folder for {{projectName}}.
Run {{startFile}}. If it does not start, right-click it, open Properties, and allow it to run as a program.
Wait for the terminal window to show the ERP link, then open that link in your browser.
Keep the terminal window open while using the ERP.
Next time, open the same extracted folder and run {{startFile}} again.
